$description: Svelte grammar REFERENCE CHECKLIST for the #2113 grammar-fidelity scorecard — WE-owned data, not scorer code. Scored against the Svelte delimiter bundle (frontierui:plugs/webnodes/recipes/svelteBundleRecipes.ts) it grades which Svelte constructs the #2074 recipe model can express and which are gaps. Constructs: single-brace {x} value expression (literal-brace collision stress for DelimiterCollisionError + escaping), {#if}/{/if} region (children:'inert'), {#each}/{/each} region, {@html}/{@const} marker sigils (@-sigil family). Mid-region marker {:else}/{:else if} is a KNOWN MODEL GAP — the recipe model has no mid-marker concept; the decision card is filed when confirmed by this gap list (per #2118 scope). Attribute-keyed directives (bind:, on:, use:) are out-of-scope-per-statute (#1986 registry). The scorer (frontierui:plugs/webnodes/grammarScorecard.ts scoreGrammar) grades each construct reproduced/partial/out-of-scope/gap. This checklist carries ZERO scorer logic.
